# Improvement (ID.IM) Improvement

## High-Level Description

**Function:** IDENTIFY (ID)
**Framework:** NIST Cybersecurity Framework v2.0

Improvements to organizational cybersecurity risk management processes, procedures and activities are identified across all CSF Functions

## What to Check

- [ ] Verify Improvement (ID.IM) Improvement outcome is achieved
- [ ] Review documentation and evidence for Improvement (ID.IM)
- [ ] Assess organizational maturity for IDENTIFY function

## How to Test

### Step 1: Identify Current Profile

Determine the organization's current and target CSF profile tier for Improvement (ID.IM).

### Step 2: Assess Outcome Achievement

```
# Review organizational policies and procedures
# Check for evidence that Improvement (ID.IM) outcome is met
# Interview stakeholders responsible for IDENTIFY
```

### Step 3: Map to Technical Controls

Identify which SP 800-53 controls implement this CSF outcome and verify their operating effectiveness.

| cloud-audit-mcp | Assess cloud security posture | `cloud_audit_*` tools        |
| Manual Review   | Policy and procedure review   | Interviews and documentation |

## Remediation Guide

Achieve the Improvement (ID.IM) Improvement outcome:

Improvements to organizational cybersecurity risk management processes, procedures and activities are identified across all CSF Functions

## Risk Assessment

| Finding                                              | Severity | Impact                |
| ---------------------------------------------------- | -------- | --------------------- |
| Improvement (ID.IM) Improvement outcome not achieved | Medium   | IDENTIFY Function Gap |

- [ ] Target profile tier defined

- [ ] Implementation roadmap exists
